name: book-translator
description: Bilingual LLM-powered translation overlay for [Calibre-Web-Automated](https://github.com/crocodilestick/Calibre-Web-Automated). Translate ebooks paragraph-by-paragraph while reading, using local LLMs (vLLM, LM Studio, Ollama) or any major Cloud API (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, Together, MiniMax, DeepSeek, OpenRouter).
author: Felix
